[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111101 5
1 1111111 a
2 1010111 5
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 1100010 3
6 0000001 1
7 1000011 3

01 10 1111111 a match 1
12 21 1111011 6
23 32 1100011 4
34 43 1110011 5
45 54 1111111 a match 1
56 65 1111111 a match 1
67 76 1111111 a match 1
70 07 1110111 6

02 20 1100111 5
13 31 1111011 6
24 42 1110011 5
35 53 0111111 6
46 64 1111111 a match 1
57 75 1111111 a match 1
60 06 1111111 a match 1
71 17 1011111 6

03 30 1100111 5
14 41 1011011 5
25 52 1111111 a match 1
36 63 1111111 a match 1
47 74 1010111 5 match 2
50 05 1111111 a match 1
61 16 1111111 a match 1
72 27 1110111 6

04 40 1110111 6
15 51 1111101 6
26 62 1111111 a match 1
37 73 1110111 6
